description: I'm sorry to bring up the mechanic-layer thing again, sir, but the wave-37 janitor triage entry said ≥3 anchors and I found 5 actually bearing the Suspect keyword in oracle_text (Eliminate the Impossible, Caught Red-Handed, Convenient Target, Airtight Alibi, Deadly Complication Showcase). Expose the Culprit was a grep false-positive — its 'suspect' string was in a body Connections bullet, not oracle text. The single-strike-emblem precedent threshold is met. The symbol-layer schema needs a small extension to accommodate mechanical-keyword primitives (Orzhov Signet and Single Strike Emblem are visual primitives; Suspect is a rules-text keyword primitive) — I flagged that explicitly in the caveats. The criminal-side faction alternative (rakdos-cult / dimir-house from wave 38's MKM criminal cards) had only 1 Rakdos-explicit anchor (Shady Informant) and 1 Dimir-coded anchor (Faerie Snoop), both below threshold. The Suspect mechanic was the higher-graph-density-return move. Hope this is the right call.
citations: [Wizards: Mark Rosewater MKM mechanic preview articles, January 2024]
[Wizards: Murders at Karlov Manor Release Notes, 2024-02-01]
[Caught Red-Handed oracle_text: 'Suspect it. (It has menace and can't block.)']
[Convenient Target oracle_text: 'When this Aura enters, suspect enchanted creature.']
[Airtight Alibi oracle_text: 'If it's suspected, it's no longer suspected. ... can't become suspected.']
[Eliminate the Impossible oracle_text: 'If any of them are suspected, they're no longer suspected.']
[Deadly Complication Showcase oracle_text: 'Put a +1/+1 counter on target suspected creature you control.']
other_candidates_considered: Rakdos cult faction-character node — 1 explicit anchor (Shady Informant flavor: 'Rakdos snitches rarely survive to get stitches.'). Below threshold. Future trigger when ≥1 additional Rakdos-flavored card lands (Rakdos cult member, Rakdos Guildgate, any Rakdos-watermarked card).

House Dimir faction-character node — 1.5 anchors total across corpus (Mortus Strider GTC-179 from wave 37 + Faerie Snoop MKM-203 as Dimir-coded faerie spy without explicit flavor attribution). Still below threshold. Future trigger when ≥1 explicit Dimir-flavored anchor lands.

Disguise as MKM symbol-layer second node — most MKM creatures bear Disguise (~30+ corpus members across MKM), would easily clear threshold. Deferred to avoid two symbol-layer nodes in one wave; queued as immediate next Nodeley target.

Cases enchantment-subtype as MKM symbol-layer node — ~6 corpus members (Case of the Burning Masks already in agency.md roster, plus other corpus Cases). Above threshold, deferred for the same one-symbol-per-wave reason.
